title: Vertical Order Traversal of a Binary Tree
hints: Assign a coordinate to each node during traversal. The root is at (0,0), left moves column left and row down, right moves column right and row down.
Group nodes by their column index. Within each column, sort the nodes first by row index, then by value to handle ties.
Use a map where keys are columns and values are lists of (row, value) tuples. Iterate through sorted keys to build the final result.
